The '''Battle of Malrev IV''' was a battle in [[1750 BBY]] during the [[New Sith Wars]] that saw the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] mercenaries defeat the forces of the [[Dark Underlord]] at [[Malrev IV]]. [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Murrtaggh]] paid a group of [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian mercenaries]] to make a diversionary attack against the [[Black Knights]], minions of the [[Dark Underlord]]. As the battle raged, Murrtaggh entered the Underlord's fortress and [[Death/Legends|killed]] him, although he fell to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] in doing it.
